title: matricaria maritima var. nana
intro: Matricaria maritima var. nana, also known as Dwarf Chamomile or Small Sea Chamomile, is a compact, perennial variety of the Sea Chamomile plant. It is a member of the Asteraceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Matricaria maritima var. nana are attributed to its essential oil, which contains chamazulene and other sesquiterpenes that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive issues, calming anxiety and insomnia, and reducing inflammation, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or oil for topical use, with herbal preparations also including capsules and tinctures.
